ComponentsProperties.Name: model-value
ComponentsProperties.Description: 绑定值，必须等于 active-value 或 inactive-value，默认为 Boolean 类型

ComponentsProperties.Name: disabled
ComponentsProperties.Description: 是否禁用

ComponentsProperties.Name: loading
ComponentsProperties.Description: 是否显示加载中

ComponentsProperties.Name: size
ComponentsProperties.Description: switch 的大小

ComponentsProperties.Name: width
ComponentsProperties.Description: switch 的宽度

ComponentsProperties.Name: inline-prompt
ComponentsProperties.Description: 无论图标或文本是否显示在点内，只会呈现文本的第一个字符

ComponentsProperties.Name: active-icon
ComponentsProperties.Description: switch 状态为 on 时所显示图标，设置此项会忽略 active-text

ComponentsProperties.Name: inactive-icon
ComponentsProperties.Description: switch 状态为 off 时所显示图标，设置此项会忽略 inactive-text

ComponentsProperties.Name: active-action-icon
ComponentsProperties.Description: on状态下显示的图标组件

ComponentsProperties.Name: inactive-action-icon
ComponentsProperties.Description: off状态下显示的图标组件

ComponentsProperties.Name: active-text
ComponentsProperties.Description: switch 打开时的文字描述

ComponentsProperties.Name: inactive-text
ComponentsProperties.Description: switch 的状态为 off 时的文字描述

ComponentsProperties.Name: active-value
ComponentsProperties.Description: switch 状态为 on 时的值

ComponentsProperties.Name: inactive-value
ComponentsProperties.Description: switch的状态为 off 时的值

ComponentsProperties.Name: name
ComponentsProperties.Description: switch 对应的 name 属性

ComponentsProperties.Name: validate-event
ComponentsProperties.Description: 是否触发表单验证

ComponentsProperties.Name: before-change
ComponentsProperties.Description: switch 状态改变前的钩子， 返回 false 或者返回 Promise 且被 reject 则停止切换

ComponentsProperties.Name: id
ComponentsProperties.Description: input 的 id

ComponentsProperties.Name: tabindex
ComponentsProperties.Description: input 的 tabindex

ComponentsProperties.Name: aria-labela11y
ComponentsProperties.Description: 等价于原生 input aria-label 属性

ComponentsProperties.Name: active-color
ComponentsProperties.Description: 当在 on 状态时的背景颜色(推荐使用 CSS var --el-switch-on-color )

ComponentsProperties.Name: inactive-color
ComponentsProperties.Description: off 状态时的背景颜色(推荐使用 CSS var --el-switch-off-color )

ComponentsProperties.Name: border-color
ComponentsProperties.Description: 开关的边框颜色 ( 推荐使用 CSS var --el-switch-border-color )

ComponentsProperties.Name: labela11y
ComponentsProperties.Description: 等价于原生 input aria-label 属性

ComponentEvents.Name: change
ComponentEvents.Description: switch 状态发生变化时的回调函数

ComponentExposes.Name: focus
ComponentExposes.Description: 手动 focus 到 switch 组件
